headline: Allegion (ALLE) Q4 2024 Earnings Transcript
summary: Q4 marked the end to another solid year of growth and strong execution by the entire Allegion team.  Allegion executed M&A amounting to $137 million in 2024, this included five bolt-on acquisitions spanning our core markets.
